mapper.sql: id, paper_id, question_id, student_id, answer, status, score, review_status, reviewer_id, remark, review_time, submit_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT sar.*, su.user_name as studentName, su.real_name as realName, q.question_type as questionType, q.stem, q.options, q.answer as correctAnswer, q.score as questionScore, q.analysis FROM student_answer_record sar LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON sar.student_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN question q ON sar.question_id = q.id WHERE sar.paper_id = #{paperId} ORDER BY sar.student_id, sar.id

SELECT sar.*, su.user_name as studentName, su.real_name as realName, q.question_type as questionType, q.stem, q.options, q.answer as correctAnswer, q.score as questionScore, q.analysis FROM student_answer_record sar LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON sar.student_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN question q ON sar.question_id = q.id WHERE sar.paper_id = #{paperId} AND sar.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY sar.id
